description: Perform a customer loyalty classification workflow in the 'demodb' database (User: root, Pass: GymAnything123!). Establish a loyalty tier system by creating a 'LoyaltyTiers' vertex class with properties 'TierName' (String), 'MinSpend' (Double), and 'Benefits' (String), populating it with four tiers: Platinum (MinSpend: 3000, Benefits: 'Priority support, free upgrades, exclusive events'), Gold (MinSpend: 1500, Benefits: 'Room upgrades, late checkout, bonus points'), Silver (MinSpend: 500, Benefits: 'Early check-in, welcome drink'), and Bronze (MinSpend: 0, Benefits: 'Newsletter, birthday discount'). Create a 'BelongsToTier' edge class and add a 'LoyaltyTier' (String) property to the existing 'Profiles' class. Classify every Profile by calculating their total order spending (traversing Profile <- HasProfile - Customer - HasOrder -> Order) and assigning them to the appropriate tier based on spending thresholds: Platinum (>= 3000), Gold (>= 1500), Silver (>= 500), or Bronze (< 500). Update each Profile's 'LoyaltyTier' property and create the corresponding 'BelongsToTier' edges. Save a summary report to '/home/ga/loyalty_report.txt' listing the count of members per tier and the names of all Platinum members.
